hints.text: The Cobustion Generator takes 1 coal and produces 20 power for 3 seconds.

actions.text: (-white)Due to the lack of vents on this sector, you will need to use coal to generate power.
(-white)Place a [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/Ground Scraper/GroundScraperComplete.png]Ground Scraper on coal to extract coal.
(-white)Place a [image]Combustion Generator and give it coal to create power.
